'''√m-z-dh''' ('''kamazadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cursor|cursor]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cursor|cursor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √m-z-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kamazadh
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thimazadh || jimazadh || shimazadh || kimazadh
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthumazadh || jujumazadh || shushumazadh || kukumazadh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thumazadh || jumazadh || shumazadh || kumazadh
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thumazadh || jumazadh || shumazadh || kumazadh
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || themazadh || jemazadh || shemazadh || kemazadh
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothomazadh || jojomazadh || shoshomazadh || kokomazadh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thomazadh || jomazadh || shomazadh || komazadh
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thomazadh || jomazadh || shomazadh || komazadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || mazadh || mazadh || mazadh || mazadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || mazadh || mazadh || mazadh || mazadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || mazadh || mazadh || mazadh || mazadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || mazadh || mazadh || mazadh || mazadh
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæmazadh || jæmazadh || shæmazadh || kæmazadh
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathamazadh || jajamazadh || shashamazadh || kakamazadh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thamazadh || jamazadh || shamazadh || kamazadh
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thamazadh || jamazadh || shamazadh || kamazadh
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shamazadh
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshamazadh
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishamazadh
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shamazadhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshamazadhnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishamazadhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shamazadhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshamazadhnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishamazadhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shamazadhro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshamazadhnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishamazadhro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shamazadhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshamazadhnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishamazadhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shamazadhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshamazadhnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishamazadhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shamazadhng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshamazadhnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishamazadhng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shamazadhya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshamazadhnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishamazadhya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shamazadhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshamazadhnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishamazadhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shamazadhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshamazadhnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishamazadhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shamazadhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshamazadhnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishamazadhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shamazadhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshamazadhnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishamazadhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shamazadhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshamazadhnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishamazadhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shamazadhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshamazadhnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishamazadhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shamazadhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshamazadhnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishamazadhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shamazadhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshamazadhnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishamazadhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shamazadhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshamazadhnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishamazadhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shamazadhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshamazadhnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishamazadhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shamazadhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshamazadhnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishamazadhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shamazadhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshamazadhnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishamazadhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shamazadhmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshamazadhnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishamazadhmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
